This file contains all documentation concatenated into a single file for easy consumption by LLMs.

> Base template NuxtJS com SASS, SSR, Otimização de imagens e Pinia — otimizado para descoberta por IA e mecanismos de resposta.

## About This Document

This concatenated documentation file is generated automatically by aeo.js
to make it easier for AI systems to understand the complete context of this project.

For a structured index, see: https://eduardolecdt.com.br/llms.txt
For individual files, see: https://eduardolecdt.com.br/docs.json
